reason: The statement applies because the text describes how the children of Israel were forced to leave Egypt due to the events far beyond their control, namely, the plagues sent by God and the urgency of the Egyptians to send them away. They had to leave in haste, taking only unleavened bread as they were thrust out of Egypt and had no time to prepare. This aligns with the idea of being forced to leave their homes and go somewhere else due to circumstances beyond their control.
